title: Create migration plan for 4 markdown blueprints to YAML
description:
## Source
Council review at `Data/Pages/council/blueprint-yaml-autonomy-council-2026-06-29.md` — Blocking issue B5  
Blueprint YAML design doc — Phase 4 dependency

## Background
Four markdown blueprints exist in `Data/Pages/blueprints/`: `small-house.md`, `wizards-tower.md`, `farm.md`, `castle.md`. The blueprint YAML design proposes YAML as the canonical format, but has no transition plan for existing blueprints. Phase 4 says "replace markdown parser" which would destroy the data path.

## Scope
Design a migration plan that:
1. Converts all 4 existing markdown blueprints to YAML via a one-shot script
2. Keeps the markdown parser operational as a fallback (permanent)
3. Updates `MemorySmithBlueprintRepository.GetAsync` to detect format (try YAML first, markdown fallback)
4. Updates `MemorySmithBlueprintRepository.SearchAsync` to handle mixed-format results
5. Updates `features/blueprint-system` wiki page with new format

## Deliverables
- Migration script: markdown → canonical YAML for all 4 blueprints
- Updated 3-stage lookup with format detection
- Wiki page update
- Backward-compatibility test: loading legacy markdown still works

## Exit Criteria
- All 4 blueprints converted to YAML (originals kept as `.md.bak` or preserved)
- Loading a legacy markdown blueprint returns the same block positions as before
- Loading a YAML blueprint returns correct block positions
- Search works across both formats
- Migration is reversible (can load old markdown at any time)
